skill_text:
A fine-tuned version of the multi-modal LayoutLM model for the task of question answering on documents. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Question Answering. API call: pipeline('question-answering', model=LayoutLMForQuestionAnswering.from_pretrained('impira/layoutlm-document-qa', return_dict=True)). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `hugging_face__impira_layoutlm_document_qa__pipeline_question_answering_128f55cc` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use examples to map paraphrases into schema-faithful arguments.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
